feedStores.blurb: Santa Cruz feed store that brings in seasonal baby chicks each spring. Call ahead for current breeds and arrival dates.
A San Lorenzo Valley feed store with seasonal chicks and poultry supplies. Call ahead to check what is in stock.
The Ben Lomond standby stocks spring chicks and teaches a poultry class timed to when the birds arrive. A good first stop for San Lorenzo Valley residents.
A family feed and pet shop in Aptos carrying poultry feed and supplies. Call ahead each spring to ask about seasonal chicks.

breeders.blurb: An Aptos breeder of rare and heritage chickens, with fertile hatching eggs and chicks. Follow their page for current hatches.
A humane Sebastopol hatchery known for rare and colorful egg layers, with chicks and hatching eggs. Ships within California and offers farm pickup.
Delivers guaranteed-hen pullets, close to laying age, on regular Central Coast routes. A low-fuss option if you would rather skip the brooder stage.
